channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Trendlines April 2026 Newsletter
item.description: This edition of Trendlines covers April 2026.

item.title: Expanding Access to Immunizations in the Americas | The CommonHealth Live!
item.description: Experts discuss the state of immunization programs in the Americas, what works to expand access to new vaccines, and the important roles played by schools, civil society organizations, and community groups in building and sustaining momentum for immunization programs.

item.title: How is the Iran War Impacting China's Economy
item.description: This report analyzes the most important economic impacts of the Iran war on China and shows that while China is better positioned than others, the conflict threatens China’s economy in key ways.

item.title: Can Space Be Disrupted Like the Strait of Hormuz?
item.description: Like the Strait of Hormuz, space is a chokepoint that can be disrupted. That disruption can be achieved and sustained without having domain superiority, and that, once disrupted, it is hard to return things back to the old normal.
